# Nil Patel

AI-Augmented Software Engineer & AI Search Visibility Consultant specializing in B2B Laravel SaaS, multi-agent orchestrations, RAG pipelines, and unified search visibility (SEO/AEO/GEO).

Based in Vadodara, Gujarat, India. Operating as an offshore developer for SNP Solutions (New Zealand), supporting clients globally across India, NZ, and Australia.

---

## ⚡ Executive Summary

- **Role**: AI-Augmented Engineer & AI Search Visibility Consultant
- **Experience**: 1+ years of proactive, real-world production engineering completed alongside studies
- **Current Pursuits**: Currently pursuing a Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) in Software Development
- **Credentials**: Hugging Face Certified Agent Developer, AI Agents Fundamentals (Hugging Face), Cloud Technical Series: AI in Action (Google Cloud), Prompt Design in Vertex AI, Cloud ADK Builder, Gemini at Work Edition, AI Tools Workshop (Be10x)
- **Domain Focus**: B2B SaaS architecture, production-grade applications, multi-agent workflows, RAG search engines, workflow orchestration (n8n), and AI Search Visibility (SEO, AEO, and GEO citation grids).
- **GitHub**: [github.com/nilpatel7530](https://github.com/nilpatel7530)
- **LinkedIn**: [linkedin.com/in/nilpatel7530](https://linkedin.com/in/nilpatel7530)
- **Website**: [nilpatel.snpsolutions.co.nz](https://nilpatel.snpsolutions.co.nz)
- **AI Agents**: [nilpatel.snpsolutions.co.nz/ai-agents](https://nilpatel.snpsolutions.co.nz/ai-agents)
- **n8n Automation**: [nilpatel.snpsolutions.co.nz/n8n-automation](https://nilpatel.snpsolutions.co.nz/n8n-automation)

- **AI Chatbots**: [nilpatel.snpsolutions.co.nz/ai-chatbots](https://nilpatel.snpsolutions.co.nz/ai-chatbots)

---

## 🛠️ Technical Stack

- **AI & LLM**: Google Gemini, Gemma (Local AI deployments), OpenAI API, LangGraph agent loops, RAG pipelines, Prompt Optimization, Vector Databases (Pinecone, pgvector), and AI Search Visibility (AEO, GEO, Entity graphs, sitemaps schemas, llms.txt).
- **Automation & Orchestration**: n8n Workflow Automation, Webhooks, RESTful APIs, custom agentic integrations.
- **Full-Stack & Backend**: Laravel (PHP), MySQL, PostgreSQL, Node.js, Express.js, FastAPI, Python.
- **Frontend & Styling**: React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap.
- **DevOps & Cloud**: Google Cloud Platform (GCP), Docker & Compose, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), Vercel, Railway, Linux administration.

---

## 🚀 Key Shipped Projects

1. **LeadGen Pro Architect** (AI & Automation)
   - *Description*: High-performance B2B lead discovery and enrichment platform featuring automated fit scoring, email optimization, and data extraction using Google Gemini API.
   - *Code*: [github.com/nilpatel7530/leadgen-pro-by-nil](https://github.com/nilpatel7530/leadgen-pro-by-nil)
2. **Goswami Sangath Matrimonial** (SaaS)
   - *Description*: Community matrimonial matchmaking platform featuring custom profile workflows, secure 2FA admin authentication, and multi-role RBAC.
   - *Demo*: [goswamisangath.in/admin](https://goswamisangath.in/admin)
3. **Creative Engineering SRS (ERM)** (CRM)
   - *Description*: Production-grade ERP portal for team scheduling, CAPEX/OPEX invoice tracking, and granular module-level permission matrices.
   - *Demo*: [srs.developmentdemo.co.in/login](https://srs.developmentdemo.co.in/login)
4. **B2B HRMS Dashboard** (SaaS)
   - *Description*: Complete human resources management system with attendance logs, employee lifecycle tools, and dual English/Arabic RTL multi-language support.
   - *Demo*: [hrms.developmentdemo.co.in/login](https://hrms.developmentdemo.co.in/login)
5. **Suyog Matrimonial Platform** (SaaS)
   - *Description*: Scalable matrimonial engine with a custom Friend system, multi-currency subscriptions with real-time exchange rates, and Cashfree payment gateways.
   - *URL*: [suyog.life](https://www.suyog.life/)
6. **TrustLine Energy Platform** (Web)
   - *Description*: Fast, SEO-optimized lead capture portal for a major renewable solar engineering firm in India.
   - *URL*: [trustlineenergy.com](https://trustlineenergy.com/)
7. **NilLeads — AI Client Finder** (AI & Automation)
   - *Description*: 100% local AI lead scraper and prospect evaluator running Gemma 4 E4B MoE in LM Studio over a 128K context window.
   - *Code*: [github.com/nilpatel7530/leadscraper](https://github.com/nilpatel7530/leadscraper)
8. **Video Watermark Remover** (Web / Automation)
   - *Description*: Video automated prep utility implementing FFmpeg delogo, crop, and blur algorithms with real-time stderr progress tracking.
   - *Code*: [github.com/nilpatel7530/video_watermark_remover_by_Nil_Patel](https://github.com/nilpatel7530/video_watermark_remover_by_Nil_Patel)
9. **YouTube Automation Agent** (AI & Automation)
   - *Description*: Autonomous Node.js channel daemon executing trend analysis, AI scripting, DALL-E thumbnailing, and scheduling video uploads via YouTube Data API.
   - *Code*: [github.com/nilpatel7530/youtube-automation-agent](https://github.com/nilpatel7530/youtube-automation-agent)
10. **Zoro Caption Generator Pro** (AI & Automation)
    - *Description*: Offline high-precision auto-captioning and subtitle styling application. Utilizes Whisper (stable-ts) for word-level sync, featuring a workshop with free-hand draggable placement and professional FFmpeg burning.
    - *Code*: [github.com/nilpatel7530/zoro-caption-generator-pro](https://github.com/nilpatel7530/zoro-caption-generator-pro)
11. **Yukti_AI** (AI & Automation)
    - *Description*: A local-first multi-agent software engineering operating system styled with a Sonoma light-glass aesthetic. Orchestrates cloud/local LLMs (LM Studio/Ollama) with MCP tools to plan, code, test, and commit files.
    - *Code*: [github.com/nilpatel7530/Yukti_AI](https://github.com/nilpatel7530/Yukti_AI)
